mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, doctor_user_id, order_number, high_opinion, real_high_opinion
mapper.select:
select from t_doctor_aync where doctor_user_id in
#{doctorUserIds}
SELECT id, create_time, update_time, doctor_user_id, order_number, high_opinion, real_high_opinion FROM t_doctor_aync WHERE doctor_user_id=#{doctorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
